name: vivero-maestro
description: Fundación técnica de la aplicación Windows Vivero Maestro

scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.verify:staging: npm run validate:staging-env && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.package:win:unpacked: npm run verify:staging && electron-builder --win dir --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win:staging: npm run verify:staging && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
